items.title: Accountability between sessions
items.description: Check-ins and follow-up so progress keeps going after you leave the gym.

items.title: Form coached in real time
items.description: Hands-on correction as you lift, so you train safely and get more from every rep.

items.title: Progress you can measure
items.description: Regular check-ins on where you started and what has actually changed since.

items.title: Every experience level
items.description: First session or your thousandth, you'll be met exactly where you are.

items.title: Straight answers, no gimmicks
items.description: Clear guidance on training, nutrition, and recovery — not whatever's trending.
